'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 6''' was the sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 6]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

==Contents==
:'''Battles & Events''':
:*[[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Escape from Hoth]] {{C|HOT 7-12}}
:**<small>Flight of the ''Millennium Falcon'' after the battle on the ice planet.</small>
:'''Characters''': 
:*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]: Reluctant Hero {{C|SEE 7-10}}
:**<small>How a timid protocol droid became vital to the success of the Rebellion.</small>
:*[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Viceroy Nute Gunray]] {{C|GUN 1-4}}
:**<small>Neimoidian leader of the Trade Federation's blockade of Naboo.</small>
:'''Planets & Locations''': 
:*[[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] {{C|NAB 5-8}}
:**<small>The hidden city beneath the waters of Naboo, home to the Gungan people.</small>
:'''Droids''': 
:*[[Viper probe droid/Legends|Arakyd Probot Series]] {{C|PRO 1-2}}
:**<small>The Imperial probes used in the search for the Rebel base.</small>
:'''Weapons & Technology''': 
:*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 Blaster]] {{C|BLA 1-2}}
:**<small>The customized weapon made famous by the smuggler and Rebel hero.</small>
:'''Vehicles''': 
:*[[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|Naboo Royal Starship]] {{C|NAB 1-2}}
:**<small>The elegantly crafted ship used as Queen Amidala's official transport.</small>
